items: Course descriptions: 0 empty across all 38 guides; robust across all structure variants
Competency bullets: near-zero empty (2 known PDF artifact cases); robust across all structure variants
Cert-prep inline mention extraction: reliable where present; high-value for cs_ug
AoS state machine parsing (INTRO → GROUP → COURSE → DESC → COMPETENCIES): validated across 3 structurally different families
Standard Path 3-column multiline parsing: validated across 24 guides (standard_bs 3-col + cs_ug)
Standard Path 2-column (no Term) parsing: validated across 3 education_ba teacher licensure guides + BSMES
Footer metadata parsing: validated across guides with footer format
Header-line metadata parsing: validated across education_ba (all 11) and many standard_bs guides
Clinical Experiences and Student Teaching as AoS group labels: validated across BSMES + 3 education_ba teacher licensure guides
False-positive Capstone detection fix: validated across all 38 guides
SP_TOTAL_RE break behavior: validated
Bullet continuation logic: validated with known edge case (Special Education course title absorption)

what_is_trustworthy_for_completed_famili.scope: 38 parsed guides only — do not extrapolate to untouched families
items: SP course count and title list per program
SP term sequence and CU values (where 3-col format confirmed)
AoS group count and structure per program
Prereq mention flags (reliable as flag; false-positive rate documented but not quantified)
Capstone identification (present/absent is reliable for parsed guides)
Guide metadata (version, pub_date) for 36 of 38 parsed guides
graduate_standard (9 guides): DEV_NOTES recommends as next target; structurally expected to be similar to standard_bs; manifests 2H/7M; no content parse done
mba (3 guides): all manifest HIGH; simple structure expected; lowest-risk untouched family
healthcare_grad (2 guides): manifest 1H/1M; small family; MHA recommended in DEV_NOTES
cs_grad (5 guides): analogous structure to cs_ug expected; minor graduate-level differences unknown
data_analytics_grad (3 guides): track variants similar in structure to swe_grad and accounting_ma
accounting_ma (5 guides): MACC track variants; manifests 0H/5M but simpler structure expected
education_bs (4 guides): likely similar to education_ba teacher licensure; Clinical/ST confirmed in manifest
teaching_mat (9 guides): expected to share structure with education_ba; Clinical/ST confirmed in manifest
BSITM Standard Path data: LOW confidence — PDF column extraction failure garbled first 5 SP titles. AoS is correct and usable.
BAESSPEE, BAESSPMM, BASPEE, BASPMM AoS completeness: 1 course per guide missing from AoS due to PDF reordering artifact. AoS otherwise complete. Use SP row count as completeness check.
Any data from 77 untouched guides: no content parse done
Endorsement family (8 guides): structure unknown; may differ substantially from degree programs
nursing_msn, nursing_pmc, nursing_rn_msn, nursing_ug (14 guides combined): clinical section handling untested; Post-Master sections silently skipped
Field Experience content (ENDELL, MAELLP12): parser not run; section format unknown
Practicum content (MSEDL): parser not run; section format unknown
Course-code matching (Phase E): not started; titles cannot be linked to Atlas course codes yet
Site artifact generation (Phase D): not started; no runtime artifacts produced

validations_earned: SP format detection (2-col, 3-col, multiline) — tested and confirmed across 38 diverse guides
AoS state machine robustness — validated across 3 families with different AoS group structures
Bullet continuation logic — validated; known edge case with Sped course title documented
Footer metadata parsing — validated across at least 34 guides
Header-line metadata parsing — validated across ~20+ guides
False-Capstone-detection fix — validated; no regressions found across 38 guides
Section anchor detection (Standard Path, Areas of Study, Capstone, Accessibility) — validated
Per-guide parsed.json / validation.json / manifest_row.json artifact generation — production-ready schema
Family validation summary artifacts (rollout_summary.json/.md) — useful audit layer
validations_still_missing: Graduate family SP format behavior (graduate_standard, cs_grad, mba, healthcare_grad, swe_grad, data_analytics_grad, accounting_ma)
Endorsement structure — may require new section handling or completely different parse path
Nursing clinical section format — Post-Master, clinical preceptor sections not yet extracted
SP course list completeness for 4 Sped education_ba guides
Bullet-continuation heuristic fix for Sped course title false-continuation (deferred)
Course-code matching (Phase E) — entire downstream matching layer
Site artifact generation (Phase D) — entire downstream build step

recommendation.overall_posture: NOT ready for broad rollout or site integration; ready for continued family rollout with clear gate testing
recommendation.what_is_ready_now: Internal data artifacts for 38 guides across 3 families are production-quality for course descriptions, competency bullets, and cert-prep mentions. These could be wired to a Phase D build step, but doing so now would cover only 33% of programs.
what_must_happen_before_integration: At minimum, complete graduate_standard rollout to validate graduate-format SP parsing
Gate test MBA or MHA to confirm no new section patterns
Reach 60-70% corpus coverage (70+ parsed guides) before beginning Phase D site artifact build
Complete Phase D build script design before site integration
Document course-code matching approach (Phase E) before wiring descriptions to course pages
next_three_concrete_steps: 1. Run graduate_standard gate test: parse MBA (all manifest HIGH; simplest graduate structure). If HIGH confidence and no new section patterns, proceed to full graduate_standard rollout (9 guides).
2. Run mba rollout (3 guides, all manifest HIGH). If clean, these 3 can go straight to full rollout without sampling.
3. Run healthcare_grad gate test (MHA or MPH). These 2 guides complete the low-risk graduate tier and add 2 more high-confidence guides.
recommendation.after_those_three: Following graduate_standard + mba + healthcare_grad rollouts, 52 guides (45%) will be parsed. Reassess readiness at that checkpoint. Consider teaching_mat and education_bs next (share validated patterns from education_ba). Defer endorsement and nursing families until structure is confirmed via gate tests.
recommendation.site_integration_posture: Defer site integration (Phase D) until ≥70% corpus coverage. Design Phase D build script now if capacity allows, but do not wire to site until coverage warrants it.
not_recommended: Proceeding directly to site integration now (33% coverage is too low)
Attempting endorsement or nursing families without gate tests
Full-corpus --all parse run across all 115 guides (parser not yet ready for nursing/endorsement)
Course-code matching (Phase E) before Phase D build script is designed
